sql.if: AND ( q.stem LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR q.analysis_text LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR q.content_json LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR q.answer_json LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_question_kp_rel rel JOIN t_knowledge_point kp ON kp.id = rel.knowledge_point_id WHERE rel.question_id = q.id AND kp.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) )

mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN q.review_status = 'APPROVED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS approvedCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN q.review_status = 'PENDING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN q.review_status = 'PENDING' AND q.creator_role = 'STUDENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingReviewCount FROM t_question q WHERE
SELECT q.* FROM t_question q WHERE q.course_id = #{courseId} AND q.deleted = 0 AND q.review_status = 'PENDING' AND q.creator_role = 'STUDENT' ORDER BY q.created_at DESC, q.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
